R Notebook

library(data.table)
library(R.utils)
library(stringr)
library(ggcorrplot)
theme_set(theme_bw())

Processing data

fnm1 = "GSE120575_Sade_Feldman_melanoma_single_cells_nolabel_1.txt.gz"
fnm2 = "GSE120575_Sade_Feldman_melanoma_single_cells_2.txt.gz"

sf_tpm1 = fread(paste0("../../scRNAseq/Sade_Feldman_2018/", fnm1), 
                fill = TRUE, header = TRUE)

sf_tpm2 = fread(paste0("../../scRNAseq/Sade_Feldman_2018/", fnm2), 
                fill = TRUE, drop = 16293, col.names = colnames(sf_tpm1))

ls_tpm = list(sf_tpm1,sf_tpm2)
rm(sf_tpm1)
rm(sf_tpm2)

sf_tpm = rbindlist(ls_tpm)

rm(ls_tpm)
dim(sf_tpm) # 55737 x 16292
## [1] 55737 16292
sf_tpm[1:2,1:4]
gene.names = sf_tpm$V1
rownames(sf_tpm) = gene.names
sf_tpm$V1 = NULL

Only select classified cells.

cell_type = read.table("./output/cell_type.txt", header = TRUE, 
                       sep = "\t", as.is = TRUE)
dim(cell_type)
## [1] 16291     4
cell_type[1:2,]
table(cell_type$type, useNA="ifany")
## 
##               B_cells           CD4T_memory                CD8T_B 
##                  1421                  1099                  2458 
##                CD8T_G       Dendritic_cells Monocytes_Macrophages 
##                  3033                   275                  1341 
##                   NK1                   NK2                   NK3 
##                   463                  1904                  1146 
##          Plasma_cells                 Tregs           unclustered 
##                   290                  1313                  1548
clustered_cells = cell_type$cell[cell_type$type != "unclustered"]
cluster_sf_tpm  = sf_tpm[, ..clustered_cells]
rownames(cluster_sf_tpm) = gene.names

dim(cluster_sf_tpm)
## [1] 55737 14743
cluster_sf_tpm[1:3,1:3]
rm(sf_tpm)
rm(clustered_cells)

Select ~10,000 genes expressed in at least a proportion of cells

Calculate the proportion of cells that each gene is expressed in

cellprop.per.gene = rowMeans(cluster_sf_tpm > 0)

he.genes = gene.names[cellprop.per.gene > 0.05]
HEgenes_cluster_tpm = cluster_sf_tpm[cellprop.per.gene > 0.05, ]
rownames(HEgenes_cluster_tpm) = he.genes
dim(HEgenes_cluster_tpm)
## [1] 10641 14743
rm(cluster_sf_tpm)
rm(cellprop.per.gene)

Read in the two versions of signature genes

sig_gene = fread("./output/SF2018_sig_gene_matrix.txt")
sig_gene_filtered = fread("./output/SF2018_sig_gene_matrix_filtered_cells.txt")

dim(sig_gene)
## [1] 542  12
dim(sig_gene_filtered)
## [1] 547  12
sig_gene[1:2,]
sig_gene_filtered[1:2,]

Check the correlations between these two versions of signature matrix.

The signature of CD8T_B does change a lot after selecting the top 200 cells with highiest expression. In fact, CD8T_B using all cells has highest correation with NK3 using filered cells, and CD8T_B using filered cells has highest correlation with NK1 using all the cells.

genes_shared = intersect(sig_gene$geneSymbol, 
                         sig_gene_filtered$geneSymbol)

mat1 = match(genes_shared, sig_gene$geneSymbol)
mat2 = match(genes_shared, sig_gene_filtered$geneSymbol)

sig_mtrx = data.matrix(sig_gene[mat1, -1])
sig_mtrx_filtered = data.matrix(sig_gene_filtered[mat2, -1])

dim(sig_mtrx)
## [1] 358  11
dim(sig_mtrx_filtered)
## [1] 358  11
sig_mtrx[1:2,]
##         B_cells CD4T_memory   CD8T_B    CD8T_G Dendritic_cells
## [1,] 0.06187896   3.9355869 3.091216 3.2307221      0.73261818
## [2,] 0.02395496   0.2493085 2.130602 0.4080745      0.08134545
##      Monocytes_Macrophages      NK1       NK2      NK3 Plasma_cells    Tregs
## [1,]             2.4749590 3.744665 3.1749685 3.233988    0.7781379 3.679733
## [2,]             0.3608277 2.492030 0.4807038 1.903202    0.5847931 3.357281
sig_mtrx_filtered[1:2,]
##      B_cells CD4T_memory  CD8T_B  CD8T_G Dendritic_cells Monocytes_Macrophages
## [1,]  0.1207     4.59970 3.59795 3.86945         0.72765               3.49785
## [2,]  0.0000     0.18055 2.29255 0.23980         0.06185               0.24575
##         NK1     NK2     NK3 Plasma_cells   Tregs
## [1,] 3.9582 3.44320 3.58300      0.88630 3.94485
## [2,] 2.7126 0.42835 2.20495      0.44525 4.38680
cr1 = cor(sig_mtrx, sig_mtrx_filtered)
summary(diag(cr1))
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##  0.8237  0.9776  0.9828  0.9676  0.9916  0.9988
sort(diag(cr1))[1:5]
##                CD8T_B Monocytes_Macrophages                CD8T_G 
##             0.8237180             0.9337782             0.9775969 
##                   NK2               B_cells 
##             0.9776595             0.9815618
summary(c(cr1))
##     Min.  1st Qu.   Median     Mean  3rd Qu.     Max. 
## -0.28838 -0.11958  0.08322  0.25106  0.63108  0.99876
ggcorrplot(cr1, tl.cex = 6)

round(cr1[c(2:4,7:9),c(2:4,7:9)], 2)
##             CD4T_memory CD8T_B CD8T_G  NK1  NK2  NK3
## CD4T_memory        0.99   0.29   0.71 0.36 0.71 0.57
## CD8T_B             0.42   0.82   0.83 0.62 0.72 0.91
## CD8T_G             0.63   0.63   0.98 0.45 0.87 0.83
## NK1                0.38   0.91   0.45 0.99 0.46 0.65
## NK2                0.71   0.56   0.91 0.47 0.98 0.85
## NK3                0.56   0.70   0.83 0.59 0.84 0.98
cor(sig_mtrx[,"CD8T_B"], sig_mtrx_filtered[,"NK3"])
## [1] 0.9135207

Read in the details of DE analysis

sig_info = fread("./output/SF2018_sig_gene_details.txt")
sig_info_filtered = fread("./output/SF2018_sig_gene_details_filtered_cells.txt")

dim(sig_info)
## [1] 10641    56
dim(sig_info_filtered)
## [1] 12763    56
sig_info[1:2,c(1:4,(ncol(sig_info)-3):ncol(sig_info)), with=F]
sig_info_filtered[1:2,c(1:4,(ncol(sig_info)-3):ncol(sig_info)), with=F]

illustrate the results for a few fenes

cluster_ct = cell_type$type[match(names(HEgenes_cluster_tpm), cell_type$cell)]
marker_col = grep("^marker_", names(sig_info), value = TRUE)

plot1 <- function(gene1, edata, cluster_ct, sig_info){
  y      = as.numeric(edata[which(rownames(edata) == gene1),])
  df1    = data.frame(expression = y, cell_type = cluster_ct)
  
  g1 = ggplot(df1, aes(x=cell_type, y=expression, fill=cell_type)) +
    geom_boxplot() + coord_flip() + theme(legend.position = "none") +
    ggtitle(gene1)
  print(g1)
  
  ct = marker_col[unlist(sig_info[gene==gene1, marker_col, with=FALSE])==1]
  print(ct)
}

plot1("FOXP3", HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_Tregs"
plot1("GZMA",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_CD8T_B" "marker_NK2"    "marker_NK3"
plot1("PDCD1", HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_CD8T_B" "marker_NK3"
plot1("CTLA4", HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_NK3"   "marker_Tregs"
plot1("LAG3",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_CD8T_B" "marker_NK3"
plot1("CD3E",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## character(0)
plot1("CD4",   HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_CD4T_memory" "marker_Tregs"
plot1("CD8A",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_CD8T_B" "marker_CD8T_G"
plot1("CD33",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_Monocytes_Macrophages"
plot1("CD14",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_Monocytes_Macrophages"
plot1("CD19",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_B_cells"
plot1("LMNA",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_NK2"
plot1("FASLG",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_CD8T_B" "marker_NK3"
plot1("VCAM1",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_CD8T_B" "marker_NK3"
plot1("LEF1",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_CD4T_memory"
setdiff(sig_info$gene[sig_info$marker_NK1 == 1], 
        sig_info_filtered$gene[sig_info_filtered$marker_NK1 == 1])
##  [1] "CCNB2"         "CCNF"          "CDKN3"         "DHFR"         
##  [5] "DNAJC9"        "DUT"           "FANCD2"        "HIST1H4C"     
##  [9] "KIF22"         "MCM7"          "NCAPG2"        "PCNA"         
## [13] "PTTG1"         "RP11-121L10.3" "RRM1"          "SMC2"         
## [17] "STMN1"         "TUBBP1"
intersect(sig_info$gene[sig_info$marker_NK1 == 1], 
          sig_info_filtered$gene[sig_info_filtered$marker_NK1 == 1])
##  [1] "ASF1B"    "ASPM"     "ATAD2"    "AURKB"    "BIRC5"    "BUB1"    
##  [7] "CASC5"    "CCNA2"    "CDK1"     "CENPE"    "CENPF"    "CENPM"   
## [13] "CKS1B"    "DTL"      "FANCI"    "FEN1"     "KIAA0101" "KIF11"   
## [19] "KIF2C"    "KIFC1"    "MAD2L1"   "MELK"     "MKI67"    "MLF1IP"  
## [25] "NCAPD2"   "NCAPG"    "NCAPH"    "NDC80"    "NUSAP1"   "PKMYT1"  
## [31] "RRM2"     "SPC24"    "TCF19"    "TK1"      "TOP2A"    "TPX2"    
## [37] "TYMS"     "UBE2C"    "UBE2T"    "UHRF1"    "WDR76"    "ZWINT"
plot1("CCNB2", HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_NK1"
plot1("CCNA2", HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_NK1"
setdiff(sig_info$gene[sig_info$marker_NK2 == 1], 
        sig_info_filtered$gene[sig_info_filtered$marker_NK2 == 1])

##  [6] "DUSP2"       "FAM177A1"    "IL18RAP"     "ITGA5"       "ITGAM"

          sig_info_filtered$gene[sig_info_filtered$marker_NK2 == 1])
##  [1] "ADRB2"     "ANXA1"     "AOAH"      "B3GNT7"    "C1orf21"   "C20orf112"
##  [7] "CCL5"      "CD247"     "CSRNP1"    "CST7"      "CX3CR1"    "DHRS3"

## [19] "KLRB1"     "KLRC1"     "MAFF"      "MATK"      "PDE4A"     "PXN"      
## [25] "RNF125"    "SAMD3"     "SORL1"     "STAT4"     "STK38"     "TGFBR3"   
## [31] "TRDC"      "TRGC1"     "TRGV9"
plot1("NFKB1",  HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

plot1("FCGR3A", HEgenes_cluster_tpm, cluster_ct, sig_info)

## [1] "marker_NK2"
setdiff(sig_info$gene[sig_info$marker_NK3 == 1], 
        sig_info_filtered$gene[sig_info_filtered$marker_NK3 == 1])
